sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 24:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 24:1
items.html: From the perspective of the vessels, the circles are better than the straightness because there are no screen and coarseness in the vessels of the circles, and there are screen and coarseness in the vessels of straightness. Also, the vessels of the circles precede the straightness. (Part Two, Chapter One, Inner Light, Item 2)
